channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Canada announces additional $120 million in aid for Sudan amid ongoing civil war
item.description: Foreign Affairs Minister Anita Anand has announced that Canada will provide an additional $120 million in humanitarian and development assistance to address the crisis in Sudan. The funding aims to su...

item.title: Ramaphosa defends B-BBEE laws as constitutional redress against Musk criticism over Starlink
item.description: President Cyril Ramaphosa has firmly defended South Africa’s Broad-Based Black Economic Empowerment (B-BBEE) policies, stating that they are not racist but rather constitutional measures designed to a...

item.title: Taifa Gas acquires 49% stake in Tanzania’s PanAfrican Energy to boost regional gas supply
item.description: Taifa Gas Tanzania has signed an agreement to acquire a 49 percent stake in PanAfrican Energy Tanzania Ltd, one of the country’s largest gas producers that operates the Songo Songo gas field. The deal...

item.title: India emphasises safe maritime transit amid Strait of Hormuz disruptions
item.description: India has strongly emphasised the need for safe and uninterrupted passage of merchant vessels following the closure of the Strait of Hormuz, a key waterway for energy imports. At the Asia Zero-Emissio...

item.title: Van Dijk Admits PSG Fully Earned Spot in Champions League Semi-Final
item.description: After Liverpool waka out of Champions League, Virgil van Dijk tok say PSG truly deserve their semi-final spot. The Reds lost 2-0 for second leg at Anfield, with Ousmane Dembele scoring two correct goa...

item.title: CBSE 10th Result 2026: Regional Performance Highlights
item.description: The CBSE Class 10th results for 2026 have been declared, and it seems like Trivandrum and Vijayawada have really done well, with pass percentages hitting a high of 99.79%. Overall, the results show a ...

item.title: PCSO Reports No Jackpot Winners for Grand Lotto 6/55 and Megalotto 6/45 Draws on April 15, 2026
item.description: The Philippine Charity Sweepstakes Office (PCSO) announced that there were no winners for the major lotto jackpot draws held on Wednesday, April 15, 2026. For the Grand Lotto 6/55, which had a jackpot...

item.title: Activists Want Probe Into Fuel Pricing Irregularities as Kenyans Face Soaring Costs
item.description: Civil society pressure is increasing on Energy Cabinet Secretary Opiyo Wandayi to step aside over alleged fuel pricing irregularities and mismanagement within Kenya’s energy sector. The grassroots gro...

item.title: Starmer declines U.S. request for UK military involvement in Iran conflict
item.description: Prime Minister Sir Keir Starmer has firmly rejected calls from U.S. President Donald Trump to involve the United Kingdom in the ongoing war between the U.S.-Israel coalition and Iran. During Prime Min...

item.title: The Life and Musical Legacy of Czech Duo Irena and Vojtěch Havlovi
item.description: Irena and Vojtěch Havlovi, a Czech married duo, were renowned for blending minimalist, ambient, and folk music with baroque instruments. Beginning their collaboration in the 1980s Prague scene, they c...

item.title: Lena Dunham Details Personal Breakup and Affair in Memoir 'Famesick'
item.description: Lena Dunham, the creator of 'Girls,' releases her memoir 'Famesick,' offering candid insights into her personal life and relationships. A central revelation details the end of her five-year relationsh...

item.title: Meru Boda Boda Rider Helps Young Boy After Viral Video Gains Attention
item.description: A Meru-based boda boda rider became an unexpected hero after posting a TikTok video of Musa Kihara, a PP1 pupil from Gituja Primary School, confidently giving directions to his home. The video, shared...

item.title: Manitoba Prepares for Potential Spring Flooding as Temperatures Rise
item.description: South-central and western Manitoba are facing a heightened risk of spring flooding, with potential impacts expected as early as this weekend. The provincial flood bulletin reports that warm temperatur...

item.title: EFF supporters gather outside court as Julius Malema faces possible prison sentence
item.description: Hundreds of Economic Freedom Fighters (EFF) supporters gathered outside the KuGompo City Magistrate's Court on Wednesday in a show of solidarity with their leader, Julius Malema. Malema is awaiting se...

item.title: Trump Announces Reopening of Strait of Hormuz Amidst China Agreement
item.description: Former US President Donald Trump has announced a significant shift in policy, reversing a recent blockade of the Strait of Hormuz and declaring it “permanently open.” This surprising decision follows ...

item.title: Tanzania discusses financial support with Standard Chartered for SGR construction
item.description: Tanzania is actively looking for financial resources to support the construction of the Standard Gauge Railway (SGR). Dr Juma Malik Akil, representing the Finance Minister, met with a delegation from ...

item.title: Mega recruitment drive at Avanthi Academy provides placements for 250 students across South India
item.description: A total of 250 students from various colleges across the north Andhra region have secured job placements through a large-scale recruitment drive held at Avanthi’s Research and Technological Academy in...

item.title: Ottawa Reports Surge in Speeding After Automated Speed Cameras Removed
item.description: The City of Ottawa has reported a significant rise in speeding, particularly in school zones, since Ontario’s provincial government shut down automated speed enforcement (ASE) cameras five months ago....

item.title: Are Kenyan content creators truly earning from social media, or is it hype?
item.description: The article digs into whether Kenyan content creators are actually ‘minting money’ from social media or just struggling to survive on likes and small sponsorships. It points out that while many young ...

item.title: United Nigeria Airlines Suspends Aircraft For Safety Check After Bird Strike
item.description: United Nigeria Airlines don ground one of im planes, a CRJ-900, after e jam bird while landing Flight UN0579 wey come from Mallam Aminu Kano International Airport go Nnamdi Azikiwe International Airpo...
